# Test Cases — summarizer-llm-4

**Generated by**: qa (S5) | **Date**: 2026-06-25 | **testcase_export**: md
**Total**: 22 ACs / 22 test scenarios (Smart QA mode — dev-test-report.md present)

| TC-ID | AC-ID | Scenario | Verification Method | Priority | Status |
|-------|-------|----------|---------------------|----------|--------|
| TC-001 | AC-4-001 | `summarize(item)` with non-empty title/body returns non-empty plain-text string of at most 2 sentences | Inject mock completion returning multi-sentence text; assert return is str, len>0, ≤2 sentences after split | P0 | PASS |
| TC-002 | AC-4-002 | LLM is called via LiteLLM with configured provider and exactly one call on cache miss | Assert `completion` mock called once; inspect call args for `model=configured_model` | P0 | PASS |
| TC-003 | AC-4-003 | LLMClient Protocol signature is exactly `summarize(item: RawItem) -> str`, unchanged | `inspect.signature(LLMClient.summarize)` asserts parameters contain `item`; return annotation is `str` | P0 | PASS |
| TC-004 | AC-4-004 | Cache hit: pre-populate cache, call summarize; assert completion never called | Pre-populate `_FakeCache` with exact computed key; assert `completion.assert_not_called()` and returned value matches stored | P0 | PASS |
| TC-005 | AC-4-005 | Cache miss: call summarize on empty cache; assert exactly one completion call and cache.set called with result | `completion.assert_called_once()`; `cache.set_calls` has 1 entry; returned value equals mock text | P0 | PASS |
| TC-006 | AC-4-006 | Cache key format equals `summary:{repo}:{item_type}:{item_id}:{content_hash}` | After summarize, inspect `cache.set_calls[0][0]`; assert `startswith("summary:a/b:issue:99:")` and full key matches computed expected_key | P0 | PASS |
| TC-007 | AC-4-007 | Same title+body always produces identical `content_hash`; two items with same content share the same key | `content_hash("Hello","World") == content_hash("Hello","World")`; confirm no collision | P0 | PASS |
| TC-008 | AC-4-008 | Changed body produces a different `content_hash`; edited item is re-summarized, not served stale | `content_hash("T","v1") != content_hash("T","v2")`; newline separator prevents title+body concat collision | P0 | PASS |
| TC-009 | AC-4-009 | LLM raises `litellm.exceptions.Timeout` for item B; A and C still produce SummarizedItems; no exception propagates | Inject `fake_completion` raising real `Timeout`; assert `result` contains ids for A and C, not B; no pytest.raises | P0 | PASS |
| TC-010 | AC-4-010 | LLM raises `BadRequestError` (4xx), `InternalServerError` (5xx), `RateLimitError` (429) — each skips item, run continues | Three separate tests with real litellm exception instances; each asserts `result == []` and no exception | P0 | PASS |
| TC-011 | AC-4-011 | Item B LLM fails; items A and C succeed; result contains A and C only | Inject fake_completion checking body content; assert `[r.raw.item_id for r in result] == ["a","c"]` | P0 | PASS |
| TC-012 | AC-4-012 | Failure log contains item identity (repo/type/id) but never `api_key` value or prompt body text | `caplog` captures WARNING; assert identity string present, `"test-key"` absent, `"Secret body content"` absent | P0 | PASS |
| TC-013 | AC-4-013 | `SummaryCache.get` raises (Redis down) → treated as miss; LLM still called; no exception | `_FakeCache(raise_on_get=True)`; assert completion called once and result returned | P0 | PASS |
| TC-014 | AC-4-014 | `SummaryCache.set` raises (Redis down) → summary still returned; no exception | `_FakeCache(raise_on_set=True)`; assert completion called, result equals mock text | P0 | PASS |
| TC-015 | AC-4-015 | 4-sentence LLM output normalized to at most 2 sentences | `normalize_summary("S1. S2. S3. S4.")`; regex-split result has ≤2 elements | P1 | PASS |
| TC-016 | AC-4-016 | Surrounding markdown code fences and extra whitespace stripped; newlines collapsed | `normalize_summary("```\nSummary.\n```")` returns `"Summary."` with no fences, no newlines | P1 | PASS |
| TC-017 | AC-4-017 | Empty `body`, non-empty `title` → LLM called with title; summary returned | `_item(body="")` passed to summarize; `completion.assert_called_once()`; result non-empty | P1 | PASS |
| TC-018 | AC-4-018 | Both `title` and `body` empty/whitespace → item skipped; zero LLM calls; empty result list | `_item(title="",body="")` in `summarize_items`; `result==[]`; `completion.assert_not_called()` | P0 | PASS |
| TC-019 | AC-4-019 | Body >8000 chars truncated before LLM call; cache key uses truncated hash | `_item(body="x"*20000)`; after summarize, compute expected key from `[:8000]` body; assert `cache.set_calls[0][0] == expected_key` | P0 | PASS |
| TC-020 | AC-4-020 | Second identical run over unchanged items makes zero new LLM calls | Run `summarize_items` twice with same items; `completion.reset_mock()` after run 1; `completion.assert_not_called()` after run 2 | P0 | PASS |
| TC-021 | AC-4-021 | `summarizer/` and `cache/` modules contain no `osspulse.github` or `osspulse.state` imports | `pkgutil.walk_packages` over both packages; check `dep.__module__` does not start with forbidden prefixes | P0 | PASS |
| TC-022 | AC-4-022 | `api_key` sourced from config and passed to `completion(api_key=...)`; no secret literal in source | Inspect `completion.call_args` for `api_key=="secret-key-123"`; `inspect.getsource(mod)` does not contain `"sk-"` or `"secret-key"` | P0 | PASS |
